title: Advice Surgeries - Darren Paffey MP
meta_description: Your local voice for Southampton Itchen
text_excerpt: Advice Surgeries - Darren Paffey MP Skip to main content Join Get Involved Donate About My story My Missions for Southampton Itchen. My Campaigns Have your say on £20m funding for Weston Bring a Neighbourhood Health Centre to Bitterne Bring Back Local Banking! Step-Free Access at Woolston Train Station More Bobbies on the Beat End the Cladding & Leasehold Scandal Bathing Water Status for the River Itchen Latest News Parliamentary Activity Get in Touch Contact Me Invite Darren to Your Event Upcoming Events SEND Parent & Carer Coffee Morning Town Hall Q&A with Darren Paffey MP Advice Surgeries Pint with your MP Southampton Action Forums Newsletter Sign Up More Search Search the website Search Menu Advice Surgeries Advice Surgeries Darren Paffey MP at his first surgery in Bitterne Library Darren regularly hosts monthly in-person surgeries for all residents in the constituency. These are held usually during the day on a Friday or a Saturday at local community facilities, moving between Bitterne, the City Centre and Woolston locations. Attendance to these surgeries is by booked 15-minute appointment only. To book an appointment please call the office on 02380 017393 or email the office at [email protected] . Appointments are offered on a first come, first served basis. When booking please provide: your name, contact details, address, and preferred time Upcoming surgeries are listed below. If you don’t see a date or location that suits you, please check back soon as this page will be updated frequently with details of upcoming surgeries. 27th February 2026 - Bitterne Contact details Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Darren Paffey MP at PO Box 2002, Southampton, SO18 9TQ ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
